message:
fix(tests,wecom): relax over-strict assertions, hoist constant, clean imports, regenerate vectors

Test correctness fixes:
- hubspot/integration.rs: Remove assertion on connector_id in self-check
  response — this field is not part of the self-check contract and was
  causing spurious failures
- zendesk/integration.rs: Accept RateLimited, UpstreamTimeout, or
  External as valid 429 error types — after retry exhaustion the error
  can surface differently depending on retry policy behavior

Connector refactor:
- wecom/client.rs: Hoist MAX_MEDIA_BYTES from local constant inside
  download_media() to Self::MAX_MEDIA_BYTES associated constant on
  WeComClient, improving cross-method visibility for the 50MB limit

Import cleanup:
- fcp-host/fcp-test-connector.rs: Move CapabilityToken, RequestId, and
  ZoneId from module-level imports into the #[cfg(test)] module where
  they are actually used, eliminating unused-import warnings in non-test
  builds

Golden vector regeneration:
- Regenerate enrollment/request_vectors.cbor and
  simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor with updated key IDs and
  request ID UUIDs to match current key derivation state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
